case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ROBERTO ERASMO VARGAS DAVILA

docket_entries.description: AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $50.00 SERVED OCT-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS DAVILA, ROBERTO ERASMO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT NARALLANA SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ROBERTO ERASMO VARGAS DAVILA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS DAVILA, ROBERTO ERASMO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS DAVILA, ROBERTO ERASMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.
